inputs.label: Crawl Space Length
inputs.businessContext: Horizontal dimension (long side) of the crawl space.

businessContext_i18n.en: Horizontal dimension (long side) of the crawl space.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Dimension horizontale (côté long) du vide sanitaire.
businessContext_i18n.es: Dimensión horizontal (lado largo) del espacio de arrastre.

inputs.label: Crawl Space Width
inputs.businessContext: Horizontal dimension (short side) of the crawl space.

businessContext_i18n.en: Horizontal dimension (short side) of the crawl space.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Dimension horizontale (côté court) du vide sanitaire.
businessContext_i18n.es: Dimensión horizontal (lado corto) del espacio de arrastre.

inputs.label: Crawl Space Height
inputs.businessContext: Vertical distance from dirt floor to bottom of floor joists.

businessContext_i18n.en: Vertical distance from dirt floor to bottom of floor joists.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Toprak zeminden döşeme kirişlerinin altına kadar olan dikey mesafe.
businessContext_i18n.de: Vertikaler Abstand vom Erdboden bis zur Unterseite der Bodenbalken.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Distance verticale du sol en terre au bas des solives de plancher.
businessContext_i18n.es: Distancia vertical desde el piso de tierra hasta la parte inferior de las viguetas del piso.

inputs.label: Vent Area Ratio
inputs.businessContext: Ratio of net free vent area to floor area. Building code: 1/150 (no vapor barrier) ≈ 0.00667; 1/1500 (with vapor barrier) ≈ 0.000667.

businessContext_i18n.en: Ratio of net free vent area to floor area. Building code: 1/150 (no vapor barrier) ≈ 0.00667; 1/1500 (with vapor barrier) ≈ 0.000667.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Net serbest havalandırma alanının taban alanına oranı. Bina yönetmeliği: buhar bariyeri yoksa 1/150 ≈ 0.00667; buhar bariyeri varsa 1/1500 ≈ 0.000667.
businessContext_i18n.de: Verhältnis der Netto-Lüftungsfläche zur Grundfläche. Bauordnung: 1/150 (ohne Dampfsperre) ≈ 0,00667; 1/1500 (mit Dampfsperre) ≈ 0,000667.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Ratio de la surface de ventilation nette libre par rapport à la surface au sol. Code du bâtiment : 1/150 (sans pare-vapeur) ≈ 0,00667 ; 1/1500 (avec pare-vapeur) ≈ 0,000667.
businessContext_i18n.es: Relación del área libre neta de ventilación con el área del piso. Código de construcción: 1/150 (sin barrera de vapor) ≈ 0.00667; 1/1500 (con barrera de vapor) ≈ 0.000667.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
